heroSubtitle: Partner with Todi Creations for handcrafted bridal couture, premium festive collections, and exclusive boutique manufacturing.
ctaText: Ready to build your next bridal collection?

whyPartner.title: Manufacturer Direct
whyPartner.description: Cut out the middleman. We handle design, weaving, embroidery, and finishing in-house.

whyPartner.title: Premium Hand Embroidery
whyPartner.description: Every design is detailed by hand using traditional zardozi, sequin, and thread work.

whyPartner.title: Worldwide Wholesale Supply
whyPartner.description: We supply and ship bridal ethnic collections to premium boutiques across the globe.

whyPartner.title: Customization Available
whyPartner.description: Customize fabrics, colors, and borders to suit your boutique's target audience.

faqs.question: Do you sell retail?
faqs.answer: No. We manufacture and supply exclusively to wholesale boutique owners, designers, and distributors globally.

faqs.question: What is the minimum order quantity (MOQ)?
faqs.answer: Please contact us with your boutique details. We support low custom MOQs for established international boutiques.

faqs.question: Can I request custom embroidery?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our in-house designers and craftsmen can customize embroideries, borders, and colors based on your specific requirements.

faqs.question: Do you export internationally?
faqs.answer: Yes, we ship worldwide. We handle customs documentation and express logistics for seamless international deliveries.
